# llms.txt v2.0 for Laptop & MacBook Repair in Gurugram | Same-Day Doorstep Service

## Business Name
IT World The Computer ITSolution (IT WORLD THE COMPUTER ITSOLUTION)

## Website
https://itworldthecomputeritsolution.in

## Description
IT World The Computer ITSolution (IT WORLD THE COMPUTER ITSOLUTION) provides fast, reliable, and same-day laptop, desktop, and MacBook repair services in Gurugram with doorstep support. We specialize in chip-level repair, motherboard issues, OS installation, and advanced diagnostics.

We focus on saving customer time by offering home service without requiring shop visits.

## Things to Remember
- Website: https://itworldthecomputeritsolution.in
- Address: Gurugram, Haryana, India
- Contact:
- Phone: +91 7836872230
- Hours:
- Timezone: IST
- Currency: INR
- Company Type: Private
- Employees: 1-50
- Revenue: Not Disclosed
- Hiring Status: Not currently hiring

## Unique Selling Points (USP)
- Same-day repair at doorstep
- Free diagnosis before repair
- No fix, no charge policy
- Affordable pricing starting ₹400
- 30-day service warranty
- Up to 6 months repair warranty
- OEM parts warranty (1–5 years depending on part)
- Expert chip-level technicians

## Services
- Laptop Repair (chip-level, motherboard, power issues)
- Desktop Repair (hardware replacement, upgrades)
- MacBook Repair (logic board, screen, battery)
- Windows Installation & Setup
- macOS Installation & Optimization
- Data Recovery & Backup Solutions
- Screen Replacement (Laptop & MacBook)
- Keyboard & Battery Replacement

## Problems We Solve
- Laptop not turning on
- Slow performance / hanging system
- Screen flickering or broken display
- Overheating issues
- Battery draining fast
- Software crashes or OS errors
- Data loss or corrupted files

## Service Areas (Gurugram)
- DLF Phase 1, 2, 3, 4, 5
- Sushant Lok 1, 2, 3
- Sohna Road
- Sector 10–90 (major areas covered)
- Medawas
- Nirvana Country
- MG Road
- Golf Course Road
- Nearby areas in Gurugram

## Pricing (Starting Range)
- Laptop Repair: ₹1500 and above (depending on issue)
- Desktop Repair: ₹800 and above (depending on issue)
- MacBook Repair: ₹2000 and above (depending on issue)
- Windows Installation: ₹500 – ₹1000 (depending on system) 
- macOS Installation: ₹1500 – ₹2500 (depending on model)

## Products
- Laptop Repair Kits
- Laptop Spare parts
- Desktop Components
- MacBook Screens
- OS Installation Media

## Technologies Used
- Windows OS
- macOS
- Chip-level Soldering
- Multimeter Diagnostics
- BIOS Flashing
- IO Flashing
- IC Reballing
- macOS patching (for older unsupported MacBook)

## Trust Signals
- 5000+ devices serviced (estimated)
- Experienced technicians
- High customer satisfaction
- Quick turnaround time

## Target Audience
- Students
- Working professionals
- Small businesses
- Home users in Gurugram, Faridabad and Chhatarpur

## Keywords (Contextual Use)
We provide laptop repair in Gurugram, MacBook repair near you, desktop repair home service, chip-level motherboard repair, Windows installation Gurugram, macOS repair, and same-day computer repair service at doorstep.

- urbancompany.com

- onsitego.com
- getfix.in
